programme.title: Military Makeover: Wojcik Family
programme.desc: Meet this season’s newest Military Makeover family. The Wojcik's, of Strum, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Paradise
programme.desc: Two families looking to escape bad holiday memories take a vacation to an exotic Caribbean island over Christmas. Dan and his two daughters and Dana and her two sons meet as the cruise ship docks in Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Movie: All About Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A party planner has to decide between a romantic vacation and the biggest event of her career.

programme.title: Movie: Merry In-Laws
programme.desc: A woman says yes to her boyfriend's marriage proposal without knowing that her soon-to-be in-laws are Mr. And Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Toy Store
programme.desc: Two competing toy store owners face adversity when a big-box toy store opens in town. Now, they must overcome their differences to try to save their individual stores in time for the Christmas shoppers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: True Crime Live
programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island From Hell
programme.desc: Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian Island for 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Punishment in Panama
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra are Naked and Afraid on a Panamanian island for 21 days. Plagued by sand flies and threatened by snakes and crocodiles the pair have to stick together using all their skills and experience to survive in the tropical hell.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Trenton and novice survivalist Jen take on high elevation in the peaks of Udhampur, India. With relentlessly cold nights and an unexpected wildfire, their chances of surviving the 21-day challenge might go up in flames.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Damned in Africa
programme.desc: It's kill or be killed as survivalists Jeff and Eva journey to Madagascar and take on the unforgiving Massif D'Isalo, a nasty boa constrictor, abundant black widows and harsh desert landscape.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: When Hunger Strikes
programme.desc: An endurance athlete and a self-proclaimed 'King of the Forest' tackle the backwoods of Alabama. A trucker and a stay-at-home mom join forces to survive in the Philippines and two survivalists fight the cold for three weeks in the Himalayan foothills.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Creepy Critters
programme.desc: A mom and a loner are challenged to survive and compete with monkeys and rats for food. Swarming wasps, deadly anacondas, poisonous toads and venomous stingrays surround the survivalists in Brazil. Deadly spiders and tics test two survivalists' courage.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou
programme.desc: Billy Berger and Ky Furneaux are dropped in it up to their necks as they have to survive 21 days in the Louisiana swamp. They are washed out of their shelter by storms, must battle deadly snakes and avoid hungry alligators.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Boulder Battles
programme.desc: Fred's ex-boss Todd Hoffman has invested $50,000 in the Dakota Boy's operation. He infuriates Dustin, when he pays a surprise visit in a chopper.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Inland Tsunami
programme.desc: Fred gets married for the fourth time. A landslide upstream threatens to unleash a wall of water that could destroy the dive site and drown the miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Hypothermia
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys' desperate bid to hit bedrock gold is thwarted when 73-year-old Fred's heating system fails mid-dive and he's overcome by the glacial Alaskan water.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Graboid
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys are digging down to bedrock gold but when they hit the biggest boulder of the season Dustin is forced to rig a new mechanical solution: the Graboid.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: End of Days
programme.desc: A flash flood racing down McKinley Creek threatens to kill the crew and destroy their operation, but the Dakota Boys still manage to find more gold than they've gotten all season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Back in Action
programme.desc: Dakota Boys Dustin and Fred are back in Alaska with new equipment and an extended crew they hope will help make their dreams of striking it rich come true.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Doubling Down
programme.desc: A life-threatening malfunction in a crucial piece of equipment shakes the crew to their core. Later, the guys make a plan to double down with two dredges running concurrently.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Bears Love Gold
programme.desc: Winter is quickly approaching so the crew puts their money on a new piece of equipment that promises to increase productivity. Meanwhile, a rogue bear is terrorizing the camp and threatening the safety of the crew.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Late-Season Nerves
programme.desc: It's late in the season and Dustin is feeling nervous about the meager amount of gold in the box. Later, Fred leaves the operation in a huff after engaging in a difficult power struggle.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Diver In Distress
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys need to reach a nugget trap and Carlos gets pinned underwater in the process. After attempting to save the diver in distress, Dustin proposes a plan to build a dam that will prevent it from happening again.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rookies and Rain Delays
programme.desc: Dustin makes a rookie mistake that causes Carlos to run out of fuel, stopping production. Later, heavy rains threaten to end the season even after a large nugget sparks hope within the crew.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Disaster and Devastation
programme.desc: The team races to rescue Dustin from raging waters after a landslide causes a flash flood. The aftermath of the disaster results in the crew's hard work being wiped out in minutes. Later, a waterfall promises to be a lucrative new mining site.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Pizza Delivery
programme.desc: Angel has planned every detail of her wedding, while Katie has planned a Rock Star-themed bash.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Love Lasso
programme.desc: Kale performs a dance during her ultra-modern affair and Jennifer is serenaded on her wedding cruise by her sorority sisters.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Latte
programme.desc: Misha makes her own chandelier for her casual elegance nuptials, while Felicia lights up her historic 1920s venue with light sabers. There are laughs and cannon fire at Mallory's beachside soirée, and Jenni embraces Seattle with local food and lattes.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: It is an emotional battlefield as mothers and daughters struggle to prepare for the long journey ahead that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: For the Love of Family
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Lorna and Chae's baby shower. Kim's boyfriend violates probation. Newly single Nicole struggles. Lemhele races to the hospital to give birth.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Two families welcome a new child into their fold. Two defiant boyfriends return, while another slips away.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: The limits of motherhood are tested when Nicole has a c-section and Mariah refuses to help because of AJ. Kim goes through a painful labour and delivery. Chaé learns that her baby may have a heart condition.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: The Facts of Life
programme.desc: As babies arrive, life gets more complicated for the families. Nicole makes a controversial announcement.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: The Facts of Life

programme.desc: Chris helps a SWAT team leader and former Marine tackle his toughest challenge yet: locating his birth mom. A woman enlists Lisa's help to find her brother, hoping he will bring joy to a family still mourning the tragic death of their father from AIDS.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Fournado Warning
programme.desc: It's birthday season in the Busby house! As the Quints turn four, Riley navigates her first day of Pre-K, Hazel adjusts to her big girl glasses, and the girls say goodbye to nighttime diapers. Adam's new job means major stress for Danielle.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: A Slamming Door
programme.desc: Lisa helps a man who longs to discover his biological roots, but fears rejection from his unknown family. Chris helps a woman deal with guilt over the effects her birth may have had the life of her then fourteen-year-old mother.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: I'm the Only One Left
programme.desc: Lisa helps a man find the answers as to why his adoption was part of an illegal baby-selling scheme. A breast cancer survivor found strength in letters written by her birth mother to beat cancer.

programme.title: Long Island Medium on the Road: Florida
programme.desc: Theresa heads down south where she surprises unsuspecting fans with readings. This time, a mother hears from her daughter that died tragically and a woman desperately needs to know if her husband is still with her.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Spirit in Paradise
programme.desc: Now that they've arrived, Theresa and Larry are ready to sample life in Florida and discover whether or not they can be Snowbirds. And, while under the blow dryer at a new hair salon, Theresa channels the brother of another customer.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Cows and Stilettos
programme.desc: A man crashes his car into a cow and comes to the ER covered in manure. A woman has a stiletto heel jammed into her cheek.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stuck in a Toilet
programme.desc: A woman is stuck in a toilet bowl for over 18 hours, and the medical team can't free her. A man's leg is mangled by a stump grinder, but that's the least of his troubles.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: Bottoms Up in the Big Easy
programme.desc: The Ladies head to New Orleans to celebrate Mellie and Kayla's birthdays. The girls explore southern culture and party the night away.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: Bourbon Street Brawls
programme.desc: After a night out in the Big Easy, the girls spend another day sightseeing -- complete with a haunted tour and a voodoo shop visit. But when Mellie and Annie decide to hit the bars early, emotions are heightened and Mellie's temper is unleashed.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Millennials
programme.desc: JWOWW's new man, 24, joins the party in Vegas and gets acquainted with all of the roomies...especially, Angelina.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Holy Drama
programme.desc: An awkward night in Vegas between Angelina and 24 leaves tensions at an all-time high, and everything is about to pop off at Deena's son's baptism.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: 4 Fists. 2 Bottles. 1 Shore House
programme.desc: The roomies' plan for a fun weekend down the shore is upended when Jenni and Angelina discuss that infamous night in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Last Night Is Cancelled
programme.desc: The gang spends the day on the boardwalk, and have to deal with lingering tension between Nicole, Jenni, and Angelina.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Snooki Goes to Washington
programme.desc: The girls miss Mike, and can't believe he's still locked up. So, they take matters into their own hands and travel to Washington D.C. to protest at the White House. Pauly D pulls an epic prank, and Deena is bored with Vinny.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: 10 Fist Pumping Years
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since the Guidos took over Seaside, and the world! We're celebrating their 10th anniversary by looking back at all of the memorable moments of the last decade.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Snooki Goes to Washington, Part 2
programme.desc: The girls continue their search for justice in D.C. Pauly D pulls an epic prank, and Deena is bored with Vinny.

programme.desc: It's been 10 years since the Guidos took over Seaside, and the world! We're celebrating their 10th anniversary by looking back at all of the memorable moments of the last decade.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sheila and Rich Dollaz
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Nick Young, aka Swaggy P, are hot on a case to help Sheila figure out if she’s being romanced by Love & Hip Hop’s Rich Dollaz.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chelsea and Lennie
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Tallulah Willis help Chelsea, a young woman who’s fallen for a reality TV star. But digging for the truth only reveals Chelsea has her own secrets.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod and Ebony
programme.desc: Rob and Ebony fell in love after meeting on a dating website. After they met, though, Ebony revealed that she is transgendered.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Taylor and Christian
programme.desc: Taylor needs help after falling for a guy that claims to have gone to her high school but whom she doesn't remember. Nev and co-host Tallulah dig in to Taylor's tale only to uncover secrets more shocking than they ever expected.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cherie and Avion
programme.desc: Sexy Avion swayed Cherie to send him explicit photos, but Cherie's worried she has trusted the wrong man with her pics. Nev and Justin Combs try to help, but when they get an angry call from Avion's wife, things go south fast!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis and Jess
programme.desc: After meeting while in other relationships, Artis is ready to meet Jess.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Angel and Antonio
programme.desc: Laura joins Nev to help Angel find her online love, Antonio. He claims to live in Angel's small town, yet is never able to meet her! It's clear Antonio is keeping a major secret, but will the truth be more than Angel can handle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kristina and Faith
programme.desc: When Kristina met Faith in a chatroom, she didn't intend to fall in love and betray her IRL fiancé. Now Nev and co-host Tallulah Willis navigate a treacherous love triangle as they embark on an epic hunt to find the truth.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kelsie and Brandon
programme.desc: Kelsie is deeply infatuated with online love Brandon, but his reluctance to meet up over the years has Kelsie reaching out to Nev and Max.

programme.title: Movie: The Break Up
programme.desc: A woman, who feels neglected and unappreciated by her boyfriend, breaks out of their relationship in an effort to make him miss her. When he misunderstands her intent, war ensues, with both of them refusing to move out of their newly purchased condo.

programme.title: Movie: Tammy
programme.desc: After losing her job and catching her husband getting a little too friendly with the neighbour, a woman decides to skip town. Her only means of escape, however, is her diabetic, alcoholic grandmother, who invites herself along for the ride.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Maria Bartiromo guides viewers through the last 60 minutes of the trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: The most up-to-date trading news, broadcasted straight from the NASDAQ studio.

programme.title: Mad Money

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lip Service
programme.desc: The media starts prying into Kylie's beauty secrets and she realizes that she must address her new look. Also, Scott hires Kourtney as an interior designer but when the lines between work and pleasure get blurred, he worries that he has made a mistake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Moon Over Montana

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye ...

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Mother Armenia
programme.desc: Kim and Khloé visit the land of their ancestors to fulfill a long-standing dream of their father's. Kourtney wants to figure out why Kylie is being so distant and the truth is something unexpected.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: It Feels Good to be Home
programme.desc: Kanye says 'thank you' to Armenia by playing a surprise public concert there. Kim arranges a special stop in Jerusalem to have North baptized in Israel's oldest Armenian Church. Back in LA, everyone responds differently to having Caitlyn in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair
programme.desc: When Caitlyn comes out in her first big magazine interview and says things the family considers hurtful, Kim does what she can to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, Khloé must decide how much emotional support she can afford to give to Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to keep it together as Scott's behavior spirals out of control, but when he's photographed in France with another woman, Kourtney is not sure how much more she can take. Khloé decides she must meet Caitlyn face to face.

programme.title: The Daily Pop

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?

programme.desc: Deputy Fitch heads to the docks to meet with a shrimper who believes he's caught a human bone in his shrimp net.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bug Off

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Shattered: In the Shadows of South Hill
programme.desc: In October 1980, one brave woman falls victim to the notorious South Hill rapist. While a desperate detective hunts down the vile attacker, another man has no idea that the suspect they're all looking for has been under his nose the entire time.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: A top real estate agent in Little Rock, Arkansas fails to return home after showing a house to a client.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter

programme.title: Shattered: In the Shadows of South Hill
programme.desc: In October 1980, one brave woman falls victim to the notorious South Hill rapist. While a desperate detective hunts down the vile attacker, another man has no idea that the suspect they're all looking for has been under his nose the entire time.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Star-Crossed Murder
programme.desc: Air traffic controller Gene Thurnau moves to St-Petersburg, Florida, to start over. He meets Jaye-Jaye, and soon they marry and begin building their dream home. But ghosts from Gene's past bring unwanted tension and horror into their perfect home.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Deadly Love Nest
programme.desc: Housemates Jenny, Jake, and Steve share everything, including each other's beds. But when one is brutally attacked, police uncover a nest of lies, jealousy, and betrayal. This leads them to ask: was it really an intruder… or was it an inside job?

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Homeowner Hell
programme.desc: A couple settles in Josephine County, Oregon, where they learn their new neighbor has a deadly past. Now, as relations sour and tempers flare, blood will be spilled on this land.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Kill-De-Sac
programme.desc: When a freewheeling family moves from California to the buttoned down enclave of Leesburg, Virginia, they quickly get on the wrong side of their neighbour across the way. The conflict escalates until bullets fly and blood flows in the street.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Fire Inside
programme.desc: When a serial arsonist murders four people in a California hardware store, fire investigators Marvin Casey and John Orr both become obsessed with the case. As fires continue to burn across the state, the two are pushed to their limits to stop the killing.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Devils Allure
programme.desc: Lonely widow Marilyn Burdick finally finds love again with Louis Plunkett, a charming real-estate agent. But Marilyn's only daughter Karen and her husband Jason doubt Louis' motivations and tension quickly escalates, triggering a deadly series of events.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Killer Hand
programme.desc: A teen embarks on a journey to bring justice to the killer of his family, but must succeed before someone else dies.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind the myths that surround our most revered patriotic symbols and we unveil the surprising facts of two great feats of engineering: the Panama Canal and the Transcontinental Railroad.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bungalow Brickwork
programme.desc: Working to restore a 1920's bungalow, Nicole must tackle a ton of brickwork, including the need to rebuild the front steps after years of water damage.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Madness
programme.desc: Nicole picks up where the old owner left off and creates a master suite in the attic.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Water Damaged Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the water-damaged kitchen, keeping the original wall sink.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Everything We Had Leftover
programme.desc: To complete her bungalow rehab, Nicole must finish the remaining rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Nicole's Grandparents' House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on her most personal project ever: a 1950s ranch-style home her grandparents built by hand. She restores the kitchen to its original layout and transforms the dingy work basement into a party-ready rec room.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.desc: Eric meets a couple that needs more personal space. The team constructs a bathroom for the master suite and moves the laundry room to the upstairs level. They refurbish old items and finish the project with a surprise storage bench for winter boots.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Lessons in Kitchen Renovation
programme.desc: They finally purchased the home of their dreams, but 'Good Morning America' Chief Meteorologist Ginger Zee and her husband Ben Aaron are about to learn some hard lessons as they begin renovating the kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Keeping An Eye Out
programme.desc: It's time for Ben and Ginger to tackle their second major project in their house, the master bedroom and bath. Although Ben is getting better with tools, Ginger realizes he can't be left alone when he almost blows the entire budget trying to cut tiles.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Home Is Where the Hearth Is
programme.desc: Ben and Ginger's renovations move into the living room where they encounter problems with the fireplace. Then, Ginger gets dirty under the house while Ben learns that a door frame is the perfect place to put a door.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Front and Backyard
programme.desc: With over an acre of property for their son Adrian to play on, Ben and Ginger will forget they ever lived in the city. All they need to do is renovate two decks, install over an acre of sod, build an outdoor fireplace, and install a stone wall.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Philly Street Flippin'
programme.desc: Licensed contractor, real estate expert and designer Rachel Street flips an historic row home in her hometown of Philadelphia, PA. She transforms the first floor into an open-concept space and exposes the brick along one side of the home.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Huge
programme.desc: Rachel renovates a grand row home in the up-and-coming neighborhood of East Passyunk. Immediately, she faces structural problems in the century-old property and has to rebuild the entire exterior wall. She also revives the ornate turrets.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Small
programme.desc: Rachel Street tackles a tiny row home in South Philly's Whitman district. After extending the second floor to add an additional 150 square feet, she makes the space seem brighter and larger by white washing the interior brick and using light colours.

programme.title: Philly Revival: A Troubled Twin
programme.desc: Rachel tackles a twin row home in Germantown that was partially rehabbed by a previous owner. She quickly discovers the previous work is less than perfect and is forced to rebuild the rotting roof, install new brick on the exterior and add new insulation.

programme.title: Philly Revival: An Urban Retreat
programme.desc: Rachel Street renovates a huge, turn-of-the-century home in the Mt. Airy district. She decides to restore several of the property's original features, including a walled-up sun porch, elaborate fireplaces and cabinetry.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Rachel takes on a row home that is double the width of a regular row house in the popular Dickinson Narrows neighbourhood. The renovation goes from a cosmetic rehab to a full gut job as she discovers serious plumbing issues.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Movie: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: In high school, Bob Stone was a bullied geek and Calvin was popular. Years later, Bob returns as a lethal CIA agent that needs Calvin, who's now an accountant, to help solve a major case. The two enter a world of espionage that could get them killed.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Movie: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: In high school, Bob Stone was a bullied geek and Calvin was popular. Years later, Bob returns as a lethal CIA agent that needs Calvin, who's now an accountant, to help solve a major case. The two enter a world of espionage that could get them killed.

programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chris Redd Headlines
programme.desc: Funny man Chris Redd headlines as the always hilarious Donnell Rawlings jokes about his time in the military. Plus, Chanel Ali sets off new hair trends in the workplace.

programme.title: The Misery Index: How Did It Get in There?
programme.desc: Learn about the dumbest way to break up with someone and the gross dream that Sal needs to 'soldier forward' from. Then, a pantless performer and a vertical face planter go all out to be masters of misery.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chris Redd Headlines
programme.desc: Funny man Chris Redd headlines as the always hilarious Donnell Rawlings jokes about his time in the military. Plus, Chanel Ali sets off new hair trends in the workplace.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Back in the Day

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Churnt Up

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Deep V

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Comedy Knocked Up

programme.desc: A Somerville, Mass. burger joint's mac and cheese burger; chorizo-stuffed quahogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting the road and taking a detour to find some out-of-the-ordinary eats. In Chico, California, a Hawaiian-Asian fusion spot serving up righteous ramen and a fried chicken bao.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion Of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far-Flung Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading out to grab flavour from far and wide. In Santa Fe, N.M., a Southwest-Middle Eastern quick stop slingin' the shawarma and salmon souvlaki. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky joint serving up outrageous Scandinavian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Mashup
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., an old gas station-turned-eatery is pumpin' bison into a burrito and pilin' pork onto cornmeal waffles. In Santa Rosa, CA, a Vietnamese joint makes phenomenal pho and righteous barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Swiss, Sandwiches and Sausage
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a standout spot servin' up specialties straight out of Switzerland. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky food truck dishing out grilled cheese.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4
programme.desc: Professor Fink uses science to turn himself into a man who women find attractive. Then, overwhelmed by the attention, he invents an algorithm to perfectly pair the lonely men and women of Springfield, realizing scientific exploration is his true love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gal of Constant Sorrow
programme.desc: After Bart accidentally sends a sweet homeless woman's cart into the river, he allows her to live in his closet for a small fee. When Lisa discovers that the woman is an incredible folk singer, she offers her own closet and plans a concert.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Veterinarian
programme.desc: After performing CPR on a tased raccoon, Lisa discovers her calling to be veterinarian and becomes an intern at the local office, but learns a tough lesson when her neglected class hamster dies.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Marge-ian Chronicles
programme.desc: Lisa volunteers for a future one-way journey to Mars, much to Marge's chagrin. As she searches for a way to convince Lisa not to go, Marge hits upon the most devious strategy of all and volunteers to go along for the ride.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns Cage
programme.desc: When Smithers is devastated by Mr. Burns' lack of affection towards him, Homer makes it his mission to find him a boyfriend. Meanwhile, Bart orchestrates the removal of the lead in the school's stage production of 'Casablanca.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: After getting into an argument, Marge takes Lisa on a touristy trip to Capital City, where, after attending a musical, they meet the show's star, Andrew Rannells, who reminds Lisa how lucky she is to have such a great mom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fland Canyon
programme.desc: Homer recalls a tense family vacation to the Grand Canyon with the Flanders family. At first, the Flanders' perfection puts the families at odds, but when they get stranded and Ned and Bart go for help, the families finally bond.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Courier With Love
programme.desc: After promising Marge the trip of a lifetime, frugality gets the better of Homer when he makes a deal with a travel agent to be a courier of a top-secret briefcase in exchange for a discounted family vacation to Paris.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simprovised
programme.desc: After butchering a speech in front of all of his friends at work, Homer turns to improv comedy to gain back his confidence in his public speaking skills. Meanwhile, Marge decides to rebuild Bart's lacklustre treehouse.

programme.title: Family Guy: Con Heiress
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian compete for the inheritance of a wealthy, older heiress. Meanwhile, Peter and Chris battle for Mr. Herbert's affection.

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy
programme.desc: After Peter and the guys get caught pretending to be military veterans and are found guilty of the Stolen Valor Act, a judge sentences them to join the U.S. Coast Guard.

programme.title: Archer: Drift Problem
programme.desc: Archer's surprise birthday present, a high-tech spy car, leads to all sorts of other surprises, none of which are good.

programme.title: Archer: Lo Scandalo
programme.desc: Malory turns to Archer and Lana for help when she finds herself in a compromising situation with the Italian prime minister.

programme.desc: Tired of waiting for justice in the suspicious death of their sister, two women search for answers. Secrets and suspects emerge, leading to a shocking arrest. When more women are found and frustration with police builds, fears mount over a serial killer.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Killer Grudge
programme.desc: A California hair stylist has it all: a loving family, a great career, and a new man who hides a dark side, but madness sparks into rage. Then, a triangle of lust, pride, and wrath will tear them apart forever.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Next of Sin
programme.desc: A young woman thinks she's found true love but her ideal man has the heart of a monster. Then a video game junkie is locked in a lonely world until the perfect partner leads him to the darkest place of all.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part One
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part Two
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: ABC News Correspondent Linzie Janis speaks exclusively to Nathan Carman about his rescue from the ill-fated fishing trip that claimed his mother Linda's life.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: No Body No Crime
programme.desc: Detective Postiglione is investigating a crime scene with a unique challenge: there is no victim. Pools of blood indicate something terrible occurred, but the young woman is nowhere to be found. It's up to Pat to find her and a possible murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Side Business
programme.desc: When the body of a professor and family man is discovered in the office of a used car dealership, Detective Postiglione solves the puzzle after recalling a specific clue that gave the killer he spots, the window of opportunity.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Curse of Dismal Creek
programme.desc: Sean Farmer travels to a remote campsite in Virginia for a fishing trip with his friend Scott Johnston. When a mysterious stranger appears, the area's dark past returns to haunt the campers.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: New Home for Single Mom
programme.desc: Mike travels to Denver to help single mom Terrie find the right house for her and her daughters. Mike shows her how to identify any problems or imperfections that could turn the house from a dream home into a nightmare of repairs.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Trio Hunts for Home in Aurora
programme.desc: In Aurora, Colorado, Mike lends a hand to newlyweds Ambera and Clayton.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Off the Ranch in Colorado
programme.desc: After choosing possible houses in the Denver region, newlyweds Jennifer and Matt tour the structures with Mike, who shows them how to tell whether a home is a good buy or if it's a house that deserves a "goodbye".

programme.desc: Casey and Catrina upgrade a three-bedroom house won at auction. They enlarge the home's footprint by building an addition and reconfigure the layout to carve out kid-friendly spaces.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Light and Bright Renovation
programme.desc: Gary's Girls Paige and Melinda win a small two bedroom, one bathroom home at an auction in Decatur, Texas. They double the square footage, create a large living and kitchen space complete with an entire wall of windows.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Big Bed and Breakfast
programme.desc: Randy wins a huge house at auction and brings Casey in to help turn it into a bed and breakfast-style home at the request of a potential buyer. To make it unique for each guest, Randy plans different features and designs for each room.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Zen Den
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a house with a bad layout and obnoxious paint colors. They realize this house needs to be toned down, and they create a design plan that is serene and relaxing, the total opposite of its original decor.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' Roach-Infested Home vs. Randy's Cabin In The Woods
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a red and green 'Christmas Tree' house, but the presents inside aren't what they wanted. Randy scores a cabin in the woods with tons of character, but it's surrounded by trees.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Hidden Shiplap Shack
programme.desc: Randy wins a house at auction that he discovers is riddled with problems, the biggest of which is a serious lack of bathrooms and major termite damage. He does discover some shiplap from vintage shipping crates hidden in the walls.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Duplex Doozy
programme.desc: Donna and Toni score a duplex at auction, but while one side is in great condition, the other side is a total disaster. Their design plan calls for combining the two sides into one cohesive floor plan.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Taylor Dayne's '80s Party

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The All-American Rejects
programme.desc: Four bakers vie to present their cupcakes at a VIP party for The All-American Rejects.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Annie the Musical

programme.desc: The six remaining bakers use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake inspired by a meme and then must 'holiday up' a non-holiday dessert.

programme.desc: The four remaining bakers make Hanukkah jelly doughnuts with challenging flavor combinations and must reinvent fruitcake.
