programme.title: Highly Questionable
programme.desc: Dan Le Batard provides his questionable approach to sports, highlighting his thoughtful, irreverent and often humorous perspective on the world of professional sports.

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Host, Tony Reali, and sports reporters representing each time zone via satellite, banter about their local and national sports stories. Reali hosts and keeps score on every comment from his studio where he is connected to each columnist's newsroom.

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: Journalists Tony Kornheiser and Mike Wilbon face off on the sports world's hottest topics within a provocative and speedy format devoted exclusively to sports opinions and headline issues.

programme.title: SportsCenter Special: Salute to the Troops
programme.desc: Michael Eaves is joined by Tim Tebow, Kirk Herbstreit, Julie Foudy and more to take you inside Fort Campbell to share the stories, demonstrate the commitment and show you the passion it takes to be a soldier in the United States Army.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Eight: 2010-2019
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Jenny and Sumit: Our Journey So Far
programme.desc: A look back at the highs and lows of Jenny and Sumit's journey.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Rockin' the Runway
programme.desc: A young widow makes her second trip to the altar, and a virgin bride hits the bridal shop for the very first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Chocolate Milk, Mermaids and Mothers
programme.desc: Alicia's unique definition of a sexy dress has her mom and the salon staff running in circles. Whitney's desire for a mermaid dress to show off her curves sends mom running for cover.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Rolling With the Punches
programme.desc: A Southern belle wants to shed her pageant image for her big day. Tomboy Jennifer wants to lose the gym shorts and be the picture of elegance when she walks down the aisle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Chances Are...
programme.desc: Tamisha and her friend battle over who has the best bridal vision. Meredith wants a simple dress for her laid-back wedding, but her family is unwilling to see her settle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Bridal Change of the Heart
programme.desc: Brandy comes to the salon armed with her country superstar boss, Naomi Judd, with a specific vision for her wedding dress. Runaway bride Rita is ready to walk down the aisle in a short gown. Victoria surprises Monte with a unique request at her fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No Such Thing as a Country Dress
programme.desc: Tareka aims to trade in her city chic style for a 'country gown'. But her fashion forward entourage has other ideas. Engineer Allison hopes to find a modest dress to match her casual style. Chelsea panics when her custom reception dress fails to impress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: We've Got a Lot of Catching Up to Do!
programme.desc: Jorge refuses to change his ways for Anfisa. Russ and Juan are at odds. Nicole's parents make a final plea. Chantel's family pushes Pedro to the edge. Luis feels Molly's wrath. David can't make both Annie and Ashley happy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I Feel Like I'm in Dress Heaven
programme.desc: Bride Sherien is ecstatic that she finally gets to shop for her wedding dress. Her fiancé is in federal prison, however, giving her a couple more years to browse. Bride Carla requires a gown for her intimate, magical elopement in Santorini, Greece.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Paying It Forward
programme.desc: Bride Alyssa can't wait for her wedding day after surviving a fierce battle with kidney disease. Surprise after surprise gets her journey off to a wonderful start. Bride Shornell has last minute dress-woes, but the consultants are ready to help.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Walking on Egg Shells
programme.desc: The BBL staff is caught off guard by Bride Kandace's unique family dynamic. Bride Kelly's pageant coach complicates things and may get shut out of this very special day if he can't keep his opinions to himself.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Somebody Just Turned on the Vixen!
programme.desc: Bride Erin wants a sexy vixen reception dress. Bride Sami and her mom are both best friends and psychics, but her mom may not be able to predict her daughter's dress tastes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Men of Honor?
programme.desc: Bride Emiliegh and her brothers are super close and a family rivalry could jeopardize her bridal appointment. Bride Holly is awful at making decisions, and her wedding dress is no exception. Her big sister and young daughter have some suggestions.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tamy Lyn's Story
programme.desc: After years of a tumultuous relationship with her husband, Tamy's eating addiction has caused her weight to balloon over 500-lbs. She has become a hermit after years of shame, and hopes to restart her life so she can better care for her son Zachary.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Rena and Lee's Story
programme.desc: Lee and Rena are battling health and anger issues while taking a desperate, second attempt to save their relationship and their lives.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Weather Mystery and Mayhem
programme.desc: From the top of a black volcano, to the bottom of a rainbow river, this episode explores the colourful mystery of the weather. From winds that can blow over a train, to hail that can flood a city, this is weather that is unbelieve.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Big Bangs
programme.desc: From icy waves in the arctic to wobbly earth in England, this episode circles the globe taking in biblical floods, exploding rocks, alien landscapes and earthquake lightning.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Surviving the Weather
programme.desc: From monster tornadoes to epic floods, when extreme weather strikes, there's no way to hit back, all we can do is fight to survive nature's onslaught.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: It's an eye opening experience when the dead center of extreme weather rolls in and there’s no time to get out of its way.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Weather Beyond Control
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of survivors who lived through treacherous conditions.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: War Zone
programme.desc: Rookie Sonny faces a 40-car pile-up that turns a major highway into a war zone; in the snow blet, a fierce storm triggers a triple-semi crash; the father-son team at Preferred Towing race to clear the road as weather blasts in.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam
programme.desc: Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. Firebrand mechanic Chuck returns to the Buffalo hangar and immediately stirs the pot.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Wreck. Recover. Repeat.
programme.desc: Al Quiring races to recover a trailer and open the TransCanada before the morning rush. Jamie runs a race of his own when a semi carrying a load of pharmaceuticals plunges down a bank. In Alberta, the burdens of running the shop solo take a toll on Colin.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Ice Storm
programme.desc: A downpour of freezing rain covers Hope and the Coq in a thick layer of ice, cutting off communication and crippling Jamie's operations. Ken Monkhouse heads to a job up a remote, ice-covered hill and relives the worst day of his life.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: You Can't Argue With Gravity
programme.desc: Al and Gord from Quiring Towing rescue a loaded semi that's teetering on the edge of a 300-foot drop. When a new client needs Colin's help, he faces a white-knuckle drive on a remote Alberta back road. Jamie tests out a new driver.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: A 200-Foot Plunge
programme.desc: David LaVau is driving home on a remote canyon road when he swerves to avoid a potential collision, then finds himself tumbling 200 feet down a ravine.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Trapped in a Blizzard
programme.desc: The Kim family take a wrong turn and find themselves stuck in snow on a logging road. With no knowledge about how survive the cold and mountains the Kim's get desperate. After 3 days they run out of food, gas and hopes of another car coming to save them.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Swamped in the Amazon
programme.desc: Yossi Ghinsberg and his friend Kevin Gale are deep in the Bolivian Amazon when they encounter extremely dangerous rapids and an unforeseen waterfall.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Family Emergency
programme.desc: During a day hike in the mountains outside of Wellington, New Zealand, Carolyn and her daughter, Rachel became lost on the descent. With the temperature dropping, Carolyn desperately tries to get her daughter shelter and warmth.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Twin Twisters
programme.desc: Two powerful tornadoes take aim at a Nebraska farming community at the same time. Bank employees take cover in a vault, while a mother and her daughter are buried in the rubble.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: The Music Plays On
programme.desc: Record-setting floods devastate Nashville, Tennessee while a woman is rescued by a neighbour on a Jet Ski just before her house goes up in flames.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion: Snow Job
programme.desc: A home invasion and an ensuing fight results in a man being shot. Detectives find one clue, a footprint left in the snow. Now with the sun rising, they need to act fast, before their only lead melts away.

programme.title: Hoarders: Betty, Jill, Jake, Bill and Paul Update
programme.desc: Check in on the progress of Jill, Jake, Betty, Bill and Paul from our first season.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary and Mary Ann
programme.desc: Mary has overstuffed her home and consignment shop, spending over $200,000; Mary Ann's husband threatens divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Randy/ Vicki
programme.desc: Randy's boardwalk memorabilia collection fills a 20,000 square foot building and numerous tractor trailers. Vicki's hoarding is breaking up her family.

programme.title: Hoarders: Tami/ George
programme.desc: Tami is battling cancer but her extreme hoarding is getting in the way of her recuperation. George's hoarding has strained his relationships with his wife, daughters, and siblings.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kevin/ Mary
programme.desc: Kevin has hoarded himself out of his Upper East Side Manhattan apartment and sleeps on a bench in front of the building. Mary has hoarded her home to capacity.

programme.title: Hoarders: Adella/ Teri
programme.desc: Adella's children try one last time to help their mother fight her hoarding. Teri's hoarding caused her doctor to call Child Protective Services to help her children.

programme.title: Hoarders: Lisa/ Bertha
programme.desc: Lisa is an active chef, a member of various cooking groups, and a compulsive food hoarder. Bertha picks through trash on her paper route searching for treasures to take home.

programme.title: The First 48: Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: In Cleveland, detectives investigate the murder of a 23-year-old mother found burned in the backyard of an abandoned house.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood on the Streets
programme.desc: In Miami, the homicide team investigates a triple shooting on a crowded bus that injured two and left a teenager dead.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: The Misery Index: How Did It Get in There?
programme.desc: Learn about the dumbest way to break up with someone and the gross dream that Sal needs to 'soldier forward' from. Then, a pantless performer and a vertical face planter go all out to be masters of misery.

programme.title: The Misery Index: He's Crushing His Man Cave Game
programme.desc: The Tenderloins witness the most embarrassing way to ruin a wedding.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Hack My Life: No Reservation Required
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke use a classic hack to secure a restaurant reservation, and it's mom vs. dad in a race to determine peanut butter and jelly supremacy.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack-a-bye Baby
programme.desc: Officers Mack and Jack come to the rescue a perp who has a tough time being alone, and Kevin attempts to find out the sex of an unborn baby.

programme.title: Hack My Life: To Tell a Lie
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin meet their toughest challenge yet when they use hacks to game a polygraph test, and Kevin learns how to defend himself with a smartphone.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Awww Craps
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin see if they can game the system with a high stakes dice-throwing hack, and they test some surprising hacks for sleeping through the night.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Addicted to Hacks
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke have dinner in a hot tub, and it's a blast from the past as Kevin re-hacks a self-tanner. Plus, our teens have let the hacks take over.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack and Cheese
programme.desc: A comedic spin on the never-ending supply of everyday life hacks.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 4
programme.desc: We’ve got not one, but 20 brain-addled thrill-seekers ready to amaze you with their idiocy, including a bullfighter with bad judgment and smashed-up stunt skiers.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 5
programme.desc: A hung-over hang-glider, several BMX klutzes, and a naked motorcycle stunt guy who gets road rash in the worst possible place.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 6
programme.desc: An alligator trainer who's almost alligator lunch, a clumsy cliff diver, and an amateur stunt man who will probably never go pro.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 7
programme.desc: Thrill seekers are captured in their less than fine moments, from flying cars to bikes with two bicyclists.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.desc: While the family works cattle, Ree Drummond's filling the freezer with delicious components ready to turn into meals at a moment's notice. There are all-purpose meatballs, fabulous in a variety of incredible speedy sauces.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: How The Cookie Crumbles

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Pizza Friday

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Turn Up the Volume

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: City Confidential: Atlantic City
programme.desc: This East Coast gambling mecca is not without its mob problems.

programme.title: City Confidential: Bad News in Battle Creek
programme.desc: Residents of a peaceful Michigan city are shocked when a local TV anchorwoman is murdered.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carlsbad: Danger in the Desert
programme.desc: Johnny Volpato, a popular politician and pharmacist, was accused of shooting his wife.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A woman is found dead and her boyfriend tries to help police catch the killer.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Up and coming lawyer Michael Fletcher can barely keep it together as he calls police to his suburban Detroit home. Upon arrival, officers find Fletcher's wife, Leann, dead from an apparent accidental self-inflicted gunshot wound.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Lethal Lovers
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach two well respected doctors, Carolyn and Ken Stahl, are found shot to death on the side of a highway. As police unravel this baffling case they find the power couple had a less than perfect marriage.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: Reeling from a recent breakup, 23 year-old Jacey McWilliams is down in the dumps until she finds herself smitten with a hot, new man. But just when it looks like they're about to take their relationship to the next level, it runs horrifically off course.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: Who Was the Preppy Killer?
programme.desc: The press seizes on 20-year-old prep school heartthrob Robert Chambers provocative claim that his then girlfriend 18-year-old Jennifer Levin was strangled to death accidentally during rough sex in Central Park.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Evil in Eden
programme.desc: Two brothers grow up in the shadow of Yosemite National Park. One, a victim of crime, becomes a national hero. The other, in the shadows, harbours feelings of rage that erupt into murderous violence and make him famous for a darker reason.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Evil in Eden
programme.desc: Two brothers grow up in the shadow of Yosemite National Park. One, a victim of crime, becomes a national hero. The other, in the shadows, harbours feelings of rage that erupt into murderous violence and make him famous for a darker reason.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Who Was the Preppy Killer?
programme.desc: The press seizes on 20-year-old prep school heartthrob Robert Chambers provocative claim that his then girlfriend 18-year-old Jennifer Levin was strangled to death accidentally during rough sex in Central Park.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The I-70 Killer
programme.desc: In the spring of 1992 a serial killer cut a swath through the Mid West. Six victims across three states, shot execution style. The victims all worked in small stores just blocks from the I-70. Why the freeway? Why did he start, and what made him stop?

programme.title: Dark Minds: Road Paved in Murder
programme.desc: In Denver, CO, a serial killer is posing the naked bodies of young women by highways outside the city. At least four victims were left this way and there may be more. The Dark Minds team is looking for connections and clues in the Aurora County Murders.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: New Mexico Desert Killings
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes from a New Mexico convenience store, two detectives discover tracks in the dirt that may lead them to answers. After a second woman disappears, it's a race against time to stop a potential serial killer.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: A missing cheerleader. A seemingly unrelated roadside fire. As two cases converge, police juggle numerous suspects and motives, until a cryptic surveillance video brings the investigation to a shocking conclusion of betrayal, devotion, and murder.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Vanishing On I-95
programme.desc: A woman driving solo to visit a friend on Florida's I-95 mysteriously vanishes. Her divorce leads police one way, but when her body is found it suggests something horribly different. Another woman who reads about the case has a hunch she knows the killer.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Manifesto
programme.desc: When Pastor Remington is gunned down in broad daylight at his church in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, police launch a massive manhunt to stop the shooter before he strikes again. Across town, the Odom family fear their own missing son is in grave danger.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Pledge
programme.desc: Debbie Smith receives the call every mother dreads: her son, Matthew, has unexpectedly died at college. As police investigate the circumstances of his death, they discover it was more than an accident, and that those closest to him may be to blame.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Oath
programme.desc: In search of a better life, the Shahanazari family immigrated from Iran to Glendale, California. But when the youngest son, Chris, is murdered in a violent home invasion, his older brother Sevan fears he himself is to blame.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Open Door Policy
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Mike and Terri Greene hits close to home in Grand Ledge, Michigan. The couple was beloved by everyone in the small town and Mike was a retired police officer. Evidence of a personal grudge, but could the motive so clear cut?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Tragedy Comes in Pairs
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico, when Crystal Houston is found murdered just 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, is killed in a suspicious accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mommy, Please Come Home
programme.desc: The tiny town of Glendive, Montana is paralyzed with fear when mother of four Susan Casey vanishes. The ensuing investigation leaves everyone to wonder if one of Susan's former flames is harboring a sinister secret - or if someone else is stalking her.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Apple Orchard into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew head into the mountains to salvage different structures of an old apple orchard. Key finds include roof tin, apple picking ladders, and apple crates. Robert also helps Ted build a commissioned iron gate.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew salvage parts off a former navy ship, the USS Zuni/ USCG Tamaroa. Key finds include an officer's table, portholes, and wooden ship frames. At the warehouse, Mike builds a table from an airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Clapp Farm Windmill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage an Aeromotor windmill in Liberty, North Carolina. They also pick through various barns on the property. Back in the woodshop, Mike uses salvaged barn wood and iron to build a floor lamp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cast Iron Storefront
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage a cast iron storefront in Vicksburg, MS. Mike and Tay also work together to build a custom table for country music duo Thompson Square.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Vaughan Furniture Company
programme.desc: Mike and Ted struggle to salvage a heavy furniture press while Robert is slowed down by explosion-proof lights. Mike and Grayson build a chair with pieces from an old suitcase and Robert discovers a vintage TV and radio.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Byrd Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team returns to a previously salvaged house to save its original log structure. Mike and Tay also learn how that wood is milled for a custom building project. Mike uses that same wood to build an end table for the property owner.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Fringer Cannery
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Country Store and Gas Station
programme.desc: The crew heads to Grottoes, Virginia, to salvage and demolish an old country store. Using materials from the project, Mike and Robert create a tribute bench for a veterans' retreat.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Carpenters Hall
programme.desc: The crew stays local and heads just down the street in Roanoke where they salvage a one-of-a-kind sign and pick through an old meeting hall. Later, Mike and Tay build a TV console out of old material.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former United Methodist Church
programme.desc: The crew head to Laurel, Delaware to salvage what they can from a former Methodist church that fell victim to water damage. The team removes pews, a bronze bell, and a greenhouse skylight before heading back to the shop.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s California Ranch Project
programme.desc: Brett is horrified when a local fire chief and his wife ask him to completely gut and restore their 1940s California Ranch. Brett sets out to show them they can have a kitchen with all the modern conveniences they desire.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake Freedom
programme.desc: For her client's cake, detail master Suzanne creates a pair of legs that are made for walking. Molly has only one day to create four realistic and playful kitty cakes.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Purr-Fect Birthday Cake

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fierce, Festive Cakes

programme.desc: The greatest games in college football history – the so-called games of the century – are remembered forever as contests where stars were born, legends were made and sport's chronicle was indelibly transformed.

programme.title: The Greatest: Upsets
programme.desc: College football has always been a game of Davids and Goliaths. Some of the most indelible results have been the ones that were least expected. These are the top 11 upsets, and the stories behind them.

programme.title: The Season: Ole Miss Football
programme.desc: John Rhys Plumlee heads to Reb Talk for the first time. Plus, go inside Coach Koonz's meeting room and watch the Rebels battle until the end with a ranked team on the road.

programme.title: SportsCenter Top Ten
programme.desc: A countdown of the top ten plays of the month.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Mandarich
programme.desc: In Jeremy Schaap's longest interview at ESPN, he tells the fascinating life story of 1989 NFL Draft pick Tony Mandarich.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Heir McNair
programme.desc: The legendary career of NFL quarterback Steve McNair, ten years following his murder. In a rare series of interviews with his family, we learn how they coped with his death and how his athletic legacy is carried on by his son, Tyler.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Leaf
programme.desc: Sharing his descent from NFL fame to addiction, former quarterback Ryan Leaf tells his inspiring story of recovery and dedication to helping others.

programme.title: E:60
programme.desc: ESPN's award-winning Sunday morning sports magazine show, featuring the biggest names and best stories in sports.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Hilinski's Hope
programme.desc: Seven months after the death of Washington State QB Tyler Hilinski, his parents cope with their grief and memories.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: The Return
programme.desc: Rocky Bleier, was drafted and sent to Vietnam during his rookie with the Steelers. He was wounded in combat and told he would never play football again, but worked his way back earning four Super Bowl rings for the Steelers.

programme.title: SportsCenter Special: Salute to the Troops
programme.desc: Michael Eaves is joined by Tim Tebow, Kirk Herbstreit, Julie Foudy and more to take you inside Fort Campbell to share the stories, demonstrate the commitment and show you the passion it takes to be a soldier in the United States Army.

programme.title: College Football Final
programme.desc: After the final whistle, College Football Final takes a look at the night's games through highlights and looks at the major storylines headed into next week's slate.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Baseball
programme.desc: An American baseball player reluctantly goes to Japan to get himself out of a slump.

programme.title: Movie: Eight Men Out
programme.desc: The story of the Chicago White Sox players who threw the 1919 World Series game for cash.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Billy
programme.desc: Award-winning actor John Turturro narrates an in-depth profile of the complicated, brilliant and combative manager Billy Martin.

programme.title: The Making of Mr. October
programme.desc: Five-time World Series champion and two-time World Series MVP, Reggie Jackson is profiled. Narrated by Ice Cube, this documentary features interviews with Reggie Jackson, Pete Rose, Derek Jeter, Julius Erving and Rickey Henderson among others.

programme.title: Baseball Seasons: 1979
programme.desc: The 'We Are Family' Pittsburgh Pirates, featuring Willie 'Pops' Stargell; 1970's stalwarts Baltimore Orioles and Cincinnati Reds returned to the Postseason; California Angels' 1st Divison title.

programme.desc: Network analysts provide in-depth coverage of all the matchups from around the league.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Atlanta Rules: The Story of the 90's Braves
programme.desc: A documentary on the Braves and how they went from perennial underperformers to the model of baseball excellence, culminating with the 1995 World Series championship.
